mapper.select:
SELECT u.* FROM sys_user u WHERE u.deleted = 0
AND u.status = #{status}
AND ( u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sys_user_role ur JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = u.id AND ur.deleted = 0 AND r.deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1 AND r.role_code = #{roleCode} )
ORDER BY u.created_at DESC
